author: Timothy Ray tP
title: Best out of the bunch
content: I literally tried almost every single music player app on the App Store,and this one clearly stood out for its functionality,ease of use,and also great sound quality. It would be even better if the Developer could integrate Siri to the app in order to enable music playback using only voice command. I wouldn’t mind in the slightest paying for that feature,Dev.
